BEFORE ROBERT LINDSKOG, P.E. TAKES THE STAND, DEFTS REQ THAT THE COURT ADDRESS THE FOLLOWING ISSUES IN ADDITION TO THE THUMB DRIVE MATTER: (1) PRECLUSION OF EXPERT LINDSKOG, P.E. FROM SPEAKING REGARDING THE OPINIONS AND CONCLUSIONS OF SERGEANT TERRY BASED ON DEFENDANT'S MIL VIII, AND (2) TO PRECLUDE EXPERT LINDSKOG, P.E. FROM TESTIFYING REGARDING HIS OPINION NO. #7, "DEFT WAS INATTENTIVE AND DISTRACTED AS HE WAS UNAWARE THAT THE VAN TRAVELED INTO THE CONED OFF CONSTRUCTION ZONE, AND STRUCK PLAINTIFF" ON THE BASIS THAT OPINION NO. 7 IS NOT PROPER EXPERT TESTIMONY FILED BY DEFENDANT CLEANERS, MARIN BRIGHAM, ROBERT A
